system.flavor: Soaring through the air like a vengeful spirit, you crash into your enemy.
system.effect:
Effect 1.
Attack: 2 damage. On hit: +1d6.
Dominant you were 1 or more spaces higher than your target, push all characters adjacent to your target 1. If you were 3 or more, deal +2 damage on hit and lower terrain under your target by 1 space.
